name: count_reachable
sum_reachable
py:
def sum_reachable(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the values of all nodes reachable from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        acc += v
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: max_reachable
py:
def max_reachable(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the maximum node value reachable from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = None
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if best is None or vals[n] > best: best = vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

name: min_reachable
py:
def min_reachable(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the minimum node value reachable from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = None
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if best is None or vals[n] < best: best = vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

name: product_reachable
py:
def product_reachable(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Multiply the values of all nodes reachable from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; p = 1
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); p *= vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return p

name: range_reachable
py:
def range_reachable(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return max minus min over reachable node values."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; lo = None; hi = None
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if lo is None or v < lo: lo = v
        if hi is None or v > hi: hi = v
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return hi - lo

name: count_leaves
py:
def count_leaves(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes that have no children."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); kids = adj.get(n, [])
        if len(kids) == 0: acc += 1
        stack.extend(kids)
    return acc

name: count_branches
py:
def count_branches(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes with two or more children."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); kids = adj.get(n, [])
        if len(kids) >= 2: acc += 1
        stack.extend(kids)
    return acc

name: count_even
py:
def count_even(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose value is even."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v % 2 == 0: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: count_above
py:
def count_above(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose value exceeds the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; k = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v > k: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def count_below(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose value is below the threshold."""

        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v < k: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))

name: sum_even
py:
def sum_even(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the values of reachable nodes whose value is even."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        acc += v if v % 2 == 0 else 0
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: sum_positive
py:
def sum_positive(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the positive values among reachable nodes."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        acc += v if v > 0 else 0
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def sum_squares(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the squares of reachable node values."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        acc += v * v
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: sum_above

def sum_above(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum reachable node values that exceed the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; k = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue

        acc += v if v > k else 0
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))

name: count_abs_above
py:
def count_abs_above(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose absolute value exceeds the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; k = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if abs(v) > k: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: max_abs
py:
def max_abs(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the maximum absolute node value reachable."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); a = abs(vals[n])
        if a > best: best = a
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

name: count_leaf_or_branch
py:
def count_leaf_or_branch(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes that are leaves or branches (not single-child)."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); kids = adj.get(n, [])
        if len(kids) != 1: acc += 1
        stack.extend(kids)
    return acc

name: sum_leaf_values
py:
def sum_leaf_values(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the values of reachable leaf nodes (no children)."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if len(adj.get(n, [])) == 0: acc += vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: sum_edge_weights
py:
def sum_edge_weights(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the weights of all edges reachable from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        for tgt, w in adj.get(n, []):
            acc += w
            stack.append(tgt)
    return acc

name: count_edges
py:
def count_edges(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count the edges reachable from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        for tgt, w in adj.get(n, []):
            acc += 1
            stack.append(tgt)
    return acc

name: max_edge_weight
py:
def max_edge_weight(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the maximum edge weight reachable (0 if none)."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        for tgt, w in adj.get(n, []):
            acc = w if w > acc else acc
            stack.append(tgt)
    return acc

name: sum_chain
py:
def sum_chain(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the values in the chain."""
    items = spec["items"]
    return sum(items) if items else 0

name: max_chain
py:
def max_chain(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the maximum value in the chain (0 if empty)."""
    items = spec["items"]
    return max(items) if items else 0
